calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings For Lack Of Property Belonging To The Estate Subject To Administration And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ariel Soto and Carol Soto in Propria Persona.

The Court read the response and granted the request to terminate the Estate for lack of assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings For Lack Of Property Belonging To The Estate Subject To Administration And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ariel Soto (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona. Carol Soto (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

This was pre-granted matter. Attorney Noel Lawrence was not present. Ariel Soto stated that they were objecting to the petition. The Court suggested the Parties contact an Attorney and indicate what they are objecting to. The matter was continued to February 9, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will notify Ms. Lawrence.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
